entries.hypothesis: A 10-feature whitelist of retail-accessible alt-data signals (earnings SUE/PEAD/recency with exp(-recency/30) decay, FINRA daily short-volume change/rank/short-exempt, insider Form 4 anchors, realized downside-skew rank, EDGAR filing density) fitted via global Lasso L1 + 3-fold expanding-window CV-MSE generates positive Carhart-4F alpha on a 2024-04-30 to 2026-04-30 holdout, with HAC-adjusted t-stat at least 1.96 (Bonferroni n=1 fresh class), Lo-2002 Sharpe at least 0.5, alpha annualized at least 3 percent, MaxDD at least -35 percent, AND at least 1 nonzero Lasso coefficient (rules out v2-v3 zero-coef structural-artifact pattern).

params_frozen.class_rationale: Fresh signal class after 3/3 FAIL in multi_source_two_stage_search_2026_04_30 (v1+v2+v3 all zero-coef under Lasso L1+CV-MSE). The decisive cross-experiment finding from v1-v3 is that the 21-feature whitelist (3 insider + 3 macro + 8 OHLCV + 3 ranks + 4 interactions) carries zero signal at the architectures and horizons tested. v4 pivots to a substantively different feature space: earnings event dynamics + short-flow + filing density, with all market-broadcast macro features dropped (cross-sectional incoherence). Substitution rate: only 2 of 21 v1-v3 features carry forward (insider_log_count, insider_log_dollar) as diagnostic anchors. Bonferroni resets to n=1 in-class.
params_frozen.class_bonferroni_caveat: Adversarial review (Gemini 3 Pro + Perplexity Sonar Reasoning Pro) flagged that declaring v4 a 'fresh class' may be Bonferroni-evasive at the research-program level (same target, universe, holdout, architecture across all 4 'classes'). Project framework is class-conditional Bonferroni per memory notes feedback_keep_searching_screeners.md and feedback_literature_not_oracle.md, which the v4 ledger entry honors. Capital-deployment decision (separate from in-class PASS verdict) should apply program-level threshold |t|≥2.50 if v4 PASSes — documented here so the tension is not silently elided.
params_frozen.architecture_rationale: Identical to v2-v3 (proven correct; settled architectural variable). v2 confirmed two-stage regime conditioning didn't help vs single global Lasso. Architectural innovation is NOT v4's research bet — feature space is.

stage2_conditional_alpha.regularization: L1 with alpha selected via 3-fold expanding-window nested CV on full train_pool with 60-day embargo (identical procedure to v2-v3)
stage2_conditional_alpha.fit_strategy: single global model fitted on entire train pool

earnings_sue_naive_4q_decayed.source: EDGAR companyfacts (already wired in alphalens/data/fundamentals/edgar_companyfacts.py + new sue.py)
earnings_sue_naive_4q_decayed.raw_construction: (current_eps - foster_naive_forecast) / sigma_residual_prior_8q. Foster-1977 naive forecast = lag_4_eps + average_drift over prior 8 quarters.
earnings_sue_naive_4q_decayed.pit_contract: filed <= asof gates current_eps. sigma_residual MUST use first-filed values for each historical quarter (NOT latest-restated). Implementation: 2D first-filed snapshot extraction in sue.py — for each historical period_end, the EPS value used is the earliest filing where filed <= that period's PIT cutoff.
earnings_sue_naive_4q_decayed.literature: Foster (1977); Bernard-Thomas (1989) PEAD; Chordia-Goyal-Sadka (2009) drift-window evidence.

earnings_pead_5d_post_decayed.raw_construction: Cumulative ticker excess return over the 5 trading days strictly after most recent 10-Q/10-K filing date f, where f satisfies (f + 5_BD <= asof) AND (f > asof - 90d). If no such filing exists, value is 0.0.
earnings_pead_5d_post_decayed.pit_contract: Truncation gate (f + 5_BD <= asof) eliminates forward-leak that initial audit draft contained (zen adversarial review Objection 2A).

earnings_recency_days.raw_construction: Trading days since most recent 10-Q/10-K filing where (filing_date + 5_BD <= asof). Capped at 90 (after which signal decays effectively to zero anyway).

short_volume_ratio_change_60d.source: FINRA Daily Short Sale Volume (new client at alphalens/data/finra/short_volume_client.py)
short_volume_ratio_change_60d.raw_construction: (20-day MA of daily_short_volume / total_volume at asof) - (same 20-day MA computed 60 BD before asof).
short_volume_ratio_change_60d.pit_contract: FINRA file dated for trade-date T is published next BD morning; available_date = T + 1 BD gates asof reads.
short_volume_ratio_change_60d.literature_pedigree_gap: Diether-Lee-Werner (2009) and canonical short-anomaly literature use bi-monthly open interest, not daily flow. Whether daily flow is itself a cross-sectional anomaly is NOT established in published literature. Deliberate novelty bet per project mission (feedback_literature_not_oracle.md). Failure mode is clean via the >=1 nonzero coef pre-reg gate.

rank_short_volume_ratio.raw_construction: Cross-sectional percentile rank of (20-day MA of daily_short_volume / total_volume) per asof slice.

short_exempt_ratio_20d.pit_contract: same as short_volume_ratio_change_60d. Short_exempt = short sales not subject to circuit-breaker uptick rule per Reg SHO Rule 201.

insider_log_count.source: EDGAR Form 4 parquet (already wired in alphalens/data/alt_data/form4_records.py + ParquetInsiderScorer)
insider_log_count.raw_construction: log1p(insider buy cluster count over trailing 90 days). Verbatim from v1-v3.
insider_log_count.pit_contract: F4 fix locked: filing-date gate (filed <= asof) AND delisting fire-sale exclusion (180d before delisting). Tests at tests/test_pit_insider_delisting_exclusion.py.
insider_log_count.role: Diagnostic anchor — same construction as v1-v3 (where it was zeroed by Lasso). Retained to test if v4's smaller feature count + fresh-class composition un-zeros it.

insider_log_dollar.raw_construction: log1p(aggregate cluster dollar value over trailing 90 days). Verbatim from v1-v3.

rank_realized_downside_skew_60d.raw_construction: Cross-sectional descending percentile rank of (std(negative_daily_returns over 60d) / std(positive_daily_returns over 60d)) per asof slice. Larger raw value = more left-skew = higher rank.
rank_realized_downside_skew_60d.pit_contract: Pure OHLCV, T+0 close-of-day asof reads.
rank_realized_downside_skew_60d.literature_pedigree_gap: Realized != implied skew empirically (Bollerslev-Todorov 2011 documents partial correlation only). The cross-sectional skew anomaly literature (Bali-Cakici-Whitelaw 2011 IVOL, Conrad-Dittmar-Ghysels 2013 ex-ante skewness) operates on option-IMPLIED skew. Substituting realized loses the theoretical anchor. Deliberate novelty bet per project mission.

filing_density_4q.raw_construction: Count of 10-Q + 10-K + 8-K filings within trailing 252 BD with filed <= asof, capped at 30.
filing_density_4q.pit_contract: filed <= asof. No restatement leakage because the count is over events, not values.

target_definition.construction: raw excess return over RF (20d-forward close-to-close minus 20d-cumulative RF). Reuses target.forward_excess_return with holding_period=20.
target_definition.post_hoc_attribution: Carhart-4F regression of realised 20d-forward portfolio returns on 20d-aggregated Mkt-RF/SMB/HML/MOM. Daily factor returns summed (arithmetic) over the 20-day holding window matching each portfolio observation. NOT pre-residualized at target level.
target_definition.horizon_rationale: 20d sits inside the documented PEAD drift window (Bernard-Thomas 1989; Chordia-Goyal-Sadka 2009 confirm 30-60d typical, with substantial drift visible at 20d). Decayed event features (SUE + PEAD with exp(-recency/30) multiplier) align with this horizon by converting event-static signals into daily-updating gradients. Per zen+perplexity adversarial review, retaining 20d is preferable to reverting to 5d (microstructure regime where v1 also FAILed) or extending to 60d (loses short-flow signal sensitivity).

portfolio_construction.ranking: predicted forward excess return per (ticker, asof) from the global Lasso (trained on 20d targets)
portfolio_construction.overlap_design: Stride=5 with holding=20 means consecutive rebalance observations share 75% of the holding window (15 of 20 days). This is equivalent to running 4 weekly tranches each holding for 20d. The portfolio_returns series at stride-5 asof dates therefore exhibits MA(3) autocorrelation by construction; HAC standard errors with maxlags=5 correct for this. Identical to v3 design.
portfolio_construction.universe: AlphaLens PIT universe (yfinance + survivorship parquet), ADV >= $5M filter applied at scoring time

cost_model.applied_to: every entry and exit (round-trip = 20 bps base + 5 bps adverse selection one-way -> 30 bps total). Identical to v3.

statistical_inference.hac_maxlags_rationale: Identical to v3. Stride=5 with holding=20 produces overlapping returns where consecutive samples share 15/20 = 75% of the window. Theoretical structure MA(3) at lag k<=3 plus residual at lag 4. Setting maxlags=5 explicitly (one above MA-order) is conservative per Newey-West / Andrews lag-selection guidance.
statistical_inference.sharpe_annualization: Lo (2002) variance-ratio-adjusted Sharpe via existing alphalens.backtest.metrics.sharpe_autocorr_adjusted. Periods-per-year = 252/stride = 50.4.

anti_overfit_constraints.lasso_l1_regularization: forces feature sparsity; same procedure as v1-v3
anti_overfit_constraints.no_post_hoc_feature_addition: any new feature requires a new pre-registration with its own Bonferroni denominator
anti_overfit_constraints.no_post_hoc_feature_removal: v4 must run with the locked 10-feature whitelist; if Lasso zeros all coefs, the FAIL verdict stands and the result is logged
anti_overfit_constraints.no_target_horizon_change: 20d horizon locked pre-Phase-B; cannot be changed mid-experiment
anti_overfit_constraints.no_decay_lambda_tuning: exp(-recency_days / 30.0) is locked; the 30.0 constant is NOT a tunable hyperparameter for v4. Future variants may re-pre-register with a different decay constant.

params_frozen.differences_from_v3: Substantively different feature whitelist (8 of 10 features are new vs v1-v3; only insider_log_count and insider_log_dollar carry forward as diagnostic anchors). All v1-v3 OHLCV / cross-sectional-rank-of-OHLCV / FRED-macro / FRED-macro-interaction features dropped. NEW infra: FINRA Daily Short Sale Volume client + Foster-SUE construction with first-filed PIT snapshots. Time-decay multipliers added for event-driven SUE + PEAD features. Architecture, target horizon, portfolio construction, cost model, statistical inference all UNCHANGED from v3.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Stage 1 (zen / gemini-3-pro-preview, thinking_mode=high): 5 objections — accepted/fixed: PEAD look-ahead truncation (Obj 2), SUE first-filed PIT (Obj 3), raw+rank multicollinearity drop (Obj 4), time-decay multiplier on event features (Obj 1 secondary fix). Partially accepted: target horizon stays at 20d (Obj 1 main claim refuted by perplexity literature confirmation that PEAD drift window is 30-60d). Surfaced not-overridden: program-level Bonferroni concern (Obj 5) — see class_bonferroni_caveat above. Stage 2 (perplexity / sonar-reasoning-pro, search_context_size=high): confirmed Obj 2/3/4. Added 3 blind-spot findings — accepted: NFCI+UMCSENT cross-sectional incoherence (both dropped). Surfaced as deliberate novelty bets per project mission: FINRA daily flow lacks open-interest literature pedigree; realized downside skew lacks implied-skew literature pedigree. Perplexity bottom-line ('drop everything without literature pedigree, run minimalist 4-feature literature-only Lasso') REJECTED as misaligned with the project's experimentation mission documented in feedback_literature_not_oracle.md and feedback_keep_searching_screeners.md. Adversarial review documented in full at docs/research/v4_alt_data_pit_audit_2026_04_30.md.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F alpha t-stat (HAC, maxlags=5) on holdout 2024-04-30 -> 2026-04-30 portfolio returns
success_criteria.pass_rule: Holdout Carhart-4F alpha t-stat >= 1.96 AND holdout Lo-adjusted Sharpe >= 0.5 AND holdout alpha annualized >= 3% AND holdout MaxDD >= -35% AND model has at least 1 nonzero coefficient (rules out v2-v3 zero-coef structural-artifact pattern)
success_criteria.mid_rule: alpha t-stat >= 1.5 AND Sharpe >= 0.3 AND >=1 nonzero coef -> MID; refine + re-pre-register before any deploy
success_criteria.fail_rule: alpha t-stat < 1.5 OR Sharpe < 0.3 OR all coefs zero -> FAIL, log to ledger, document v4 verdict
success_criteria.deployment_threshold_program_level: Even on PASS, capital-deployment decision applies program-level Bonferroni n=4 across all 4 classes ever tested on this target+universe+holdout -> |t| >= 2.50. Below 2.50 = research-only verdict, not capital-deployable.
success_criteria.phase_robustness_followup: If holdout PASS or MID, run multi-phase audit (5 phase offsets) on 2014-2026 with same architecture; PASS only if every phase alpha t-stat >= 1.5 AND mean alpha t-stat >= 1.96 (in-class) or >= 2.50 (program-level for deploy). If holdout FAIL outright, skip Phase C.
success_criteria.comparison_to_prior: v1 mean phase alpha-t = +0.65; v2 = +0.55; v3 = +0.55. v4 in-class needs holdout alpha-t >= 1.96 (~3.5x prior). Honest expectation: with 2 anchor features that historically zero and 6 novelty bets without literature pedigree, FAIL/MID more likely than PASS. The PASS case would imply either (a) the time-decay reformulation surfaces signal that v1-v3 framing buried, OR (b) one of the FINRA-flow / downside-skew / filing-density novelty bets contains undiscovered cross-sectional signal.

params_frozen.v1_supersession_reason: v1 (alt_data_screener_v1_finra_blocked_2026_04_30) was registered with a 10-feature whitelist that included 3 features sourced from FINRA Daily Short Sale Volume. Pre-Phase-A infrastructure investigation (2026-04-30) discovered: (1) cdn.finra.org/equity/regsho/daily/CNMS*shvol*.txt returns HTTP 403 on programmatic access regardless of User-Agent / Referer headers; (2) FINRA Query API at api.finra.org/data/group/otcMarket/name/regShoDaily returns only the trailing ~10 months of data with random gaps, structurally unusable for backtesting; (3) FINRA's consolidated Daily Short Sale Volume archive itself only begins 2018-08-01 even if accessible. v2 reformulates Group B to use Polygon's /stocks/v1/short-interest endpoint, which IS available on the existing $29/mo Stocks Starter key with bi-monthly historical depth back to 2017-12-29 (verified 2026-04-30 against AAPL: 200 records, settlement_date 2017-12-29 → 2026-04-15). This is a STRICT UPGRADE on three dimensions: (a) literature pedigree restored — bi-monthly open interest is the canonical Diether-Lee-Werner (2009) anomaly construct that v1's daily-flow design lacked; (b) infra simpler — single REST endpoint vs custom CDN scraper; (c) PIT cleaner — settlement_date + 8 BD dissemination lag is documented vs flow-based PIT contract. Trade-off: training window truncates from 2014-01-01 → 2018-01-01 (loses 4 years of pre-short-interest history); Lasso CV power on 6.3y train slightly reduced but holdout n=99 unchanged.

Substitution rate: only 2 of 21 prior-class features carry forward (insider_log_count, insider_log_dollar) as diagnostic anchors. Bonferroni resets to n=1 in-class.
params_frozen.class_bonferroni_caveat: Adversarial review (Gemini 3 Pro + Perplexity Sonar Reasoning Pro) flagged that declaring v4 a 'fresh class' may be Bonferroni-evasive at the research-program level (same target, universe, holdout, architecture across all 4 'classes'). Project framework is class-conditional Bonferroni per memory notes feedback_keep_searching_screeners.md and feedback_literature_not_oracle.md, which the v4 ledger entry honors. Capital-deployment decision (separate from in-class PASS verdict) should apply program-level threshold |t|>=2.50 if v4 PASSes — documented here so the tension is not silently elided. v1->v2 supersession does NOT increment Bonferroni n: v1 never ran, no holdout was observed, no information leaked.

log1p_days_to_cover.pit_contract: settlement_date + 8 BD <= asof. Polygon computes days_to_cover using the avg_daily_volume window FINRA reports (typically 20-day trailing through settlement).
log1p_days_to_cover.literature: Engelberg-Reed-Ringgenberg (2018) RFS on short-squeeze risk; days-to-cover is the canonical squeeze-risk metric.

Partially accepted: target horizon stays at 20d (Obj 1 main claim refuted by perplexity literature confirmation that PEAD drift window is 30-60d). Surfaced not-overridden: program-level Bonferroni concern (Obj 5) — see class_bonferroni_caveat above. Stage 2 (perplexity / sonar-reasoning-pro, search_context_size=high): confirmed Obj 2/3/4. Added 3 blind-spot findings — accepted: NFCI+UMCSENT cross-sectional incoherence (both dropped). Surfaced as deliberate novelty bets per project mission: FINRA daily flow lacks open-interest literature pedigree (RESOLVED in v2 — bi-monthly open interest from Polygon DOES have full DLW/Asquith-Pathak-Ritter pedigree); realized downside skew lacks implied-skew literature pedigree (still novelty bet). Perplexity bottom-line ('drop everything without literature pedigree, run minimalist 4-feature literature-only Lasso') REJECTED as misaligned with project's experimentation mission documented in feedback_literature_not_oracle.md and feedback_keep_searching_screeners.md. Adversarial review documented in full at docs/research/v4_alt_data_pit_audit_2026_04_30.md. Stage 3 (perplexity_research / sonar-deep-research, reasoning_effort=high) on FINRA infra: identified Polygon/Massive bi-monthly short-interest endpoint as in-budget alternative; v2 supersession is the result.

periods.train_truncation_rationale: Polygon short-interest historical depth begins 2017-12-29; v2 train start at 2018-01-01 is the earliest point at which all 10 features are PIT-correct. v1's 2014-01-01 start is no longer attainable given FINRA infra block.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F alpha t-stat (HAC, maxlags=5) on holdout 2024-04-30 -> 2026-04-30 portfolio returns
success_criteria.bonferroni_threshold: n=2 in class alt_data_screener_search_2026_04_30 (system counts v1 abandoned + v2 active) -> |t| >= 2.24 by canonical preregister threshold computation. Methodological note: v1 never observed holdout data and was abandoned for INFRA reasons before any code ran, so a strict-no-leakage perspective would argue n=1. Project ledger framework counts every registered hypothesis and v2 accepts the more conservative threshold.
success_criteria.pass_rule: Holdout Carhart-4F alpha t-stat >= 2.24 AND holdout Lo-adjusted Sharpe >= 0.5 AND holdout alpha annualized >= 3% AND holdout MaxDD >= -35% AND model has at least 1 nonzero coefficient (rules out zero-coef structural-artifact pattern)
success_criteria.mid_rule: alpha t-stat >= 1.5 AND Sharpe >= 0.3 AND >=1 nonzero coef -> MID; refine + re-pre-register before any deploy
success_criteria.fail_rule: alpha t-stat < 1.5 OR Sharpe < 0.3 OR all coefs zero -> FAIL, log to ledger, document v4 v2 verdict
success_criteria.deployment_threshold_program_level: Even on PASS, capital-deployment decision applies program-level Bonferroni n=4 across all 4 classes ever tested on this target+universe+holdout -> |t| >= 2.50. Below 2.50 = research-only verdict, not capital-deployable.
success_criteria.phase_robustness_followup: If holdout PASS or MID, run multi-phase audit (5 phase offsets) on 2018-2026 with same architecture; PASS only if every phase alpha t-stat >= 1.5 AND mean alpha t-stat >= 2.24 (in-class) or >= 2.50 (program-level for deploy). If holdout FAIL outright, skip Phase C.
success_criteria.comparison_to_prior: Prior class v1-v3 mean phase alpha-t = +0.65 / +0.55 / +0.55. v4 v2 in-class needs holdout alpha-t >= 2.24 (~3.5x prior). Honest expectation: with 2 anchor features that historically zero, 5 fresh-but-literature-pedigreed features (3 short-interest + SUE + PEAD), 1 OHLCV-derived novelty, 1 event-density novelty, FAIL/MID more likely than PASS. The PASS case would imply either (a) the time-decay reformulation surfaces signal that prior-class framing buried, OR (b) the literature-pedigreed short-interest features (which the prior class lacked entirely) carry meaningful cross-sectional signal that combines productively with earnings event dynamics.

outcome.notes: Holdout outright FAIL: 0/10 nonzero coefs (explicit pre-reg gate), alpha_t=0.05 (HAC=5), MaxDD=-61.5%. Phase C skipped per pre-reg. The +0.78 Sharpe and +7.3% net excess are structural artifacts (Lasso predicts the mean). 4th experiment with 0-coef pattern. Next test in class needs |t|>=2.39 (n=3). Audit: docs/research/alt_data_screener_v2_audit.json.

entries.hypothesis: v3 same-class ablation of v4 v2 FAIL (0/10 coefs). Keep ALL identical (10 features, Lasso L1, 3-fold expanding CV-MSE, 60d embargo, 25-pt grid, train 2018-01-01 to 2024-04-29, holdout 2024-04-30 to 2026-04-30, stride=5, holding=20, top-30 long EW, 30bps cost, HAC=5, Lo-2002 Sharpe). ONE change: target rank-transformed per-asof (percentile_rank - 0.5) BEFORE fitting. Mathematically aligns Lasso inner solver with Spearman rank-IC. Tests hypothesis that target shape (heavy-tailed return) was bottleneck, not feature content. Bonferroni n=3 -> |t|>=2.39 PASS. NEW gates per zen+perplexity adversarial review: in-CV IR (mean fold rank-IC / std fold rank-IC) >= 1.0 AND holdout mean per-asof rank-IC > 0. If FAIL, evidence narrows search to model class (LightGBM).

params_frozen.v2_to_v3_diff_summary: v2 (2026-04-30) FAIL with 0/10 nonzero coefs under Lasso L1 + CV-MSE on raw 20d-forward excess return target. v3 keeps EVERYTHING identical (same 10 features, same Lasso L1, same 3-fold expanding CV-MSE with 60d embargo, same 25-pt glmnet grid, same train/holdout periods, same stride/holding/cost/HAC=5/Lo-2002 Sharpe, same top-30 long EW selection rule) and changes ONE thing: the target is rank-transformed per-asof to (percentile_rank - 0.5) BEFORE fitting. This aligns the inner Lasso solver with the Spearman rank-IC objective (mathematically: minimizing MSE on rank-percentile target = maximizing Pearson correlation with rank = Spearman correlation). Original adversarial-review proposal (outer-loop CV-objective swap, argmax rank-IC instead of argmin MSE) was REJECTED after zen review flagged inner/outer mismatch — the Lasso coordinate-descent inner solver still minimizes MSE+L1 regardless of outer scoring, so coefs would still squash to zero. Target transformation resolves the mismatch by changing what MSE is computed against.
params_frozen.class_rationale: Same-class ablation of alt_data_screener_search_2026_04_30. v1 abandoned (FINRA infra). v2 FAIL (raw-return target). v3 isolates target shape as the variable. Per project framework feedback_keep_searching_screeners.md, search remains open; class-conditional Bonferroni handles multiplicity.
params_frozen.class_bonferroni: n=3 in class (v1 abandoned + v2 completed-FAIL + v3 active) -> canonical preregister threshold |t| >= 2.39. v3 accepts the conservative threshold per project framework.
params_frozen.harking_caveat: Perplexity adversarial review flagged HARKing risk: 4 prior failures across 2 classes -> new objective design -> expected success is the pattern pre-registration is designed to prevent. Mitigations: (a) explicit pre-registration with falsification gates BEFORE running (this JSON); (b) class-conditional Bonferroni already conservative (n=3 -> 2.39 vs naive 1.96); (c) NEW falsification gates added: in-CV IR >= 1.0 AND holdout mean rank-IC > 0; (d) capital-deploy threshold remains program-level n=4+ -> |t| >= 2.50. The HARKing concern is acknowledged in the ledger and accepted as inherent to iterative research; v3 verdict will be honestly logged regardless of outcome.
params_frozen.architecture_rationale: Identical to v2-v3 of prior class and v4 v2 (settled architectural variable). Architecture is NOT v3's research bet — target transformation is.

stage2_conditional_alpha.regularization: L1 with alpha selected via 3-fold expanding-window nested CV on full train pool with 60-day embargo (identical to v4 v2)
stage2_conditional_alpha.fit_strategy: single global model fitted on entire train pool
stage2_conditional_alpha.cv_objective: argmin mean fold MSE on rank-transformed target
stage2_conditional_alpha.cv_objective_alignment: Minimizing MSE between Lasso predictions and per-asof rank-percentile target is equivalent (up to constant) to maximizing the Pearson correlation between predictions and ranks within asof, which is Spearman rank correlation. Inner solver and CV objective are aligned.

params_frozen.feature_construction_unchanged: All 10 features computed identically to v4 v2 per docs/research/preregistration/params_alt_data_screener_v2_2026_04_30.json. No feature construction changes.

target_definition.raw_target: 20-day forward excess return over RF (same as v4 v2)
target_definition.transformation: Per-asof percentile-rank centering: y_transformed[i] = (rankdata(y_raw[asof_slice], method='average') / n_asof) - 0.5
target_definition.transformation_rationale: Compresses heavy-tailed return distribution to bounded [-0.5, +0.5] target with mean 0 and std ~0.29. Lasso L1 + MSE on this target is mathematically equivalent to Spearman rank-IC maximization. Eliminates the tail-magnification penalty that drove v4 v2 to lambda_max.
target_definition.asof_slice_minimum_size_rationale: Spearman rank correlation undefined for n<3; asof slices with fewer tickers (post-ADV filter) excluded from train pool.
target_definition.post_hoc_attribution: Carhart-4F regression of realised 20d-forward portfolio returns on 20d-aggregated Mkt-RF/SMB/HML/MOM. UNCHANGED: portfolio still trades real returns, just selected via rank-trained scorer.
target_definition.horizon_unchanged: 20d-forward, same as v4 v2 and prior class v3.

portfolio_construction.ranking: predicted score per (ticker, asof) from rank-trained Lasso. Score is in rank-target's units; ordering matters, magnitude does not.
portfolio_construction.overlap_design: Stride=5 with holding=20: 75% overlap, MA(3) autocorrelation, HAC maxlags=5. Identical to v4 v2.
portfolio_construction.universe: AlphaLens PIT universe (yfinance + survivorship parquet), ADV >= $5M filter applied at scoring time (identical to v4 v2)

cost_model.applied_to: every entry and exit; round-trip 20 bps base + 5 bps adverse selection -> 30 bps total. Identical to v4 v2.

statistical_inference.sharpe_annualization: Lo (2002) variance-ratio-adjusted via alphalens.backtest.metrics.sharpe_autocorr_adjusted, periods_per_year=252/5=50.4. Identical to v4 v2.

params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Stage 1 (zen / gemini-3-pro-preview, thinking_mode=high): identified inner/outer objective mismatch in original design (CV-objective swap with unchanged Lasso inner solver) - this 'fatal flaw' was ACCEPTED and the design pivoted to target transformation, which preserves convexity and aligns the inner+implicit-outer optimization. Zen also added: (a) IR gate to replace vacuous nonzero-coef gate under rank-objective; (b) explicit fillna(0) handling for constant-prediction asof slices; (c) Spearman over Kendall for O(n log n) compute. Stage 2 (perplexity / sonar-reasoning-pro, search_context_size=high): HARKing concern (4 failures -> new objective -> expected success); MITIGATION via explicit pre-registration in this JSON + class-conditional Bonferroni n=3 -> 2.39 + new IR/holdout-IC gates + program-level deploy threshold |t|>=2.50. Spurious-positive in-fold IC under noise concern -> ACCEPTED, IR gate addresses. Permutation null test -> DEFERRED to Phase C if Phase B clears initial gates. Full review log: docs/research/v5_rankic_lasso_design_2026_05_01.md.

success_criteria.new_gates_rationale: in-CV IR gate addresses zen Objection 3: under rank-target argmax-equivalent, ANY non-trivial lambda beats lambda_max via random fold noise. IR gate (mean/std across folds) ensures the chosen lambda has CONSISTENT positive IC across folds, not one-fold lucky pick. Holdout-IC gate addresses perplexity HARKing concern: holdout period not used for lambda selection, so positive holdout rank-IC is true out-of-sample evidence.

If holdout FAIL outright, skip Phase C.
success_criteria.permutation_null_followup: If Phase C PASS, optional: run permutation null test (shuffle ranks within each asof, refit 100 times, verify chosen-lambda holdout-IC > 95% CI of permuted distribution). Adds compute (100 refits x 25 lambdas) but provides non-parametric null distribution evidence beyond Carhart-4F.
success_criteria.comparison_to_prior: Prior class v1-v3 mean phase alpha-t = +0.65 / +0.55 / +0.55 (all 0-coef). v4 v2 alpha-t = +0.05 (0-coef, MaxDD -61.5%). v3 in-class needs holdout alpha-t >= 2.39 — substantially higher bar than ALL prior. Honest expectation: if zen's diagnostic right (target shape was bottleneck), v3 may produce non-trivial coefs and modest positive alpha; whether t clears 2.39 is uncertain. MID more likely than PASS. If zen's diagnostic wrong (features are real bottleneck), v3 fails IR gate and/or holdout-IC gate, providing CLEAN diagnostic that next class should explore model class (LightGBM/XGBoost) rather than further objective tweaking.

outcome.notes: FAIL on in-CV IR gate (0.338 < 0.50 MID) and significant NEGATIVE alpha t-stat (-4.32). However STRUCTURALLY DIFFERENT from prior 4 zero-coef FAILs: v3 produced 2/10 nonzero coefs (rank_short_interest_pct_float=-0.0063 + filing_density_4q=+0.0016, both DLW/literature-canonical signs) AND positive holdout mean rank-IC (+0.0260). Rank-target transform CONFIRMED as correct architecture. Failure mechanism: top-30 selection magnifies tail behavior; bulk rank-IC=+0.026 inverts under tail selection in 2024-2026 short-squeeze regime. Phase C skipped per pre-reg. Class 2/3 actual FAIL; next test |t|>=2.50. Defensible next options: A long/short decile spread (most informative), B LightGBM, C 5-fold CV. Findings: docs/research/alt_data_screener_v3_audit.json.

entries.hypothesis: v4 same-class continuation of v3 FAIL (αt=−4.32 with 2/10 nonzero coefs and +0.0260 holdout mean rank-IC). Keep ALL identical (10 features, Lasso L1 with target_transform='rank', 3-fold expanding CV-MSE, 60d embargo, 25-pt grid, train 2018-01-01 to 2024-04-29, holdout 2024-04-30 to 2026-04-30, stride=5, holding=20, 30bps cost per leg, HAC=5, Lo-2002 Sharpe). ONE change: selection rule = long top-decile EW MINUS short bottom-decile EW with ex-ante SI<=15% short-leg HTB filter. Tests hypothesis that v3's bulk +0.0260 rank-IC translates to L/S decile spread alpha when tail magnification (top-30) is replaced with bulk averaging (decile spread). Bonferroni n=4 -> |t|>=2.50. NEW gates retained from v3: in-CV IR >= 1.0 AND holdout mean per-asof rank-IC > 0. ADDED descriptive: |Mkt-RF beta| <= 0.20 sanity. EXPLICITLY DIAGNOSTIC ONLY: capital deploy off-table regardless of outcome (burnt-holdout HARKing acknowledged in adversarial review).

params_frozen.v3_to_v4_diff_summary: v3 (rank-target Lasso) FAIL'd structurally informatively: 2/10 nonzero coefs (rank_short_interest_pct_float=-0.0063 DLW-canonical, filing_density_4q=+0.0016 literature-canonical), holdout mean per-asof Spearman rank-IC=+0.0260 (POSITIVE bulk signal), but top-30 selection inverted on holdout (alpha_t=-4.32) due to 2024-2026 short-squeeze regime crushing the lowest-SI + highest-filing-density quality bucket. v4 keeps EVERYTHING identical (same 10 features, same Lasso L1 with target_transform='rank', same 3-fold expanding CV-MSE with 60d embargo, same 25-pt grid, same train/holdout periods, same stride/holding/HAC=5/Lo-2002 Sharpe) and changes ONE thing: the selection rule becomes long top-decile EW MINUS short bottom-decile EW (market-neutral L/S spread) instead of top-30 long EW. Rationale: bulk +0.0260 rank-IC is a population-level statement about the WHOLE cross-section; decile spread (~10% of ~1033 names = ~103 per leg) averages over 20% of the cross-section per leg, capturing the bulk signal without magnifying the regime-flipping tail behavior of top-30.

FAIL or MID verdict informs next-class decision (option B LightGBM, option E feature expansion).

params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Stage 1 (zen / gemini-3-pro-preview, thinking_mode=high, 2026-05-01): two flaws flagged FATAL and resolved. Flaw 1 — rank-to-return asymmetry trap: rank-target Lasso is blind to magnitudes; +0.0260 rank-IC can survive 1 meme +300% short squeeze in bottom decile (99/100 ordinals correct). L/S decile portfolio TRADES return tails the model ignored. ACKNOWLEDGED as inherent rank-IC -> spread translation risk; SI > 15% filter dampens worst HTB squeezers; FAIL of v4 under tail asymmetry is a clean diagnostic (next class: LightGBM with quantile loss). Flaw 2 — hard-to-borrow short leg: bottom decile = high-SI per Lasso coef, real Russell-2000 borrow on these spikes 20-100% annualized, not 1.5%. ADOPTED via SI > 15% ex-ante filter on short-eligible universe. Two zen recs NOT adopted (HARKing flexibility): inverse-vol weighting on short leg (would be NEW design var post-review; deferred to v5 if needed), smaller decile variants (HARKing flexibility). Stage 2 (perplexity / sonar-reasoning-pro, search_context_size=high, 2026-05-01): HARKing on burnt holdout (MODERATE-HIGH) MITIGATED via 'diagnostic only - capital deploy off-table' framing; Bonferroni n=4 inadequacy under shared-regime experiments NOT adopted (project framework canon); IC-to-alpha mapping pre-specification ACCEPTED (this JSON makes it explicit); modest rank-IC may not support decile economics ACKNOWLEDGED as failure mode; borrow cost under-estimation PARTIALLY addressed by SI filter; bootstrap decile-spread significance DEFERRED to Phase D if Phase B clears. Full review log: docs/research/v6_longshort_decile_design_2026_05_01.md.

Adds compute (1000 bootstrap iterations) but provides non-parametric significance evidence beyond Carhart-4F. Per perplexity rec [7] Timmermann bootstrap.

Honest expectation per design memo: FAIL >> MID > PASS. Distribution: 35% FAIL middle-decile / 25% FAIL short-leg tail / 25% MID partial signal / 12% FAIL symmetric tail decay / 3% PASS bulk-signal-clean.

outcome.notes: FAIL on in-CV IR gate (0.338 < 0.50 MID, identical to v3) AND significant NEGATIVE alpha t-stat (-2.57). Coefs identical to v3 (rank_SI=-0.0063, filing_density=+0.0016). Holdout mean rank-IC=+0.0260 (positive bulk, identical to v3). DIAGNOSTIC: zen Objection #1 (rank-to-return asymmetry trap) MATERIALIZED. Despite SI<=15% short-leg HTB filter, bottom-decile-by-score still squeezed: short leg returned +108.5%/y in 2024-2025 short-squeeze regime. Long leg modest +20.6%/y. L/S net Sharpe -1.41. Mkt-RF beta=-0.29 (failed |beta|<=0.20 descriptive). 2026 partial: L/S +52.3%/y (squeeze unwinding). Class 4/4 FAIL. Next test |t|>=2.58 (n=5). Bottleneck SETTLED: linear-Lasso + rank-target is rank-blind to magnitudes; selection rules of any tail aggressiveness (top-30 v3, top-decile L/S v4) get crushed by tail return events the model could not see. Next-class options: B LightGBM with quantile loss, E different feature space, G magnitude-aware loss.

feature_construction_new.pit_contract: GradeDate <= asof - 1 BD (one business day dissemination embargo to avoid intraday look-ahead).
feature_construction_new.decay_tau_rationale: Womack 1996 / Stickel 1995 post-rating-change drift profile shows steepest decay 5-15d post-event; 10d half-life centered in this band. Distinct from existing alt_data 30d decay (quarterly fundamentals time-scale).
feature_construction_new.feature_1_def: Decay-weighted mean of action_score over 60d trailing events. action_score: 'up'->+1, 'down'->-1, 'init'/'main'/'reit'->0, unmappable string -> NaN propagation. Decay weight: exp(-(asof - GradeDate.date()) / 10). Range [-1, +1] when defined; NaN when zero events.
feature_construction_new.feature_2_def: Decay-weighted mean of (currentPriceTarget - priorPriceTarget) / priorPriceTarget over 60d events with priorPriceTarget > 0 (excluded initiation events with prior=0). Same exp(-d/10) weight. NaN when zero valid events.
feature_construction_new.feature_3_def: log1p(count of events in 60d window). No decay (intensity proxy, not directional). Always >=0; NaN does not occur.

target_definition.raw_target: 20-day forward excess return over RF (same as v3, v4)
target_definition.transformation: Per-asof percentile-rank centering (same as v3, v4)
target_definition.post_hoc_attribution: Carhart-4F regression of realised 20d-forward L/S returns on 20d-aggregated Mkt-RF/SMB/HML/MOM with subtract_rf=False.

portfolio_construction.short_eligibility: post-ADV cross-section AND short_interest_pct_float <= 0.15 at asof (UNCHANGED from v4 HTB filter)
portfolio_construction.overlap_design: Stride=5 with holding=20: 75% overlap, MA(3) autocorrelation, HAC maxlags=5. Identical to v3, v4.

cost_model.borrow_fee_separate: 1.5% annualized on short-leg notional; reported alongside primary cost; not subtracted from headline alpha

statistical_inference.carhart_regression: Carhart-4F with subtract_rf=False (L/S spread is relative excess)

success_criteria.fail_rule: anything that doesn't clear MID -> FAIL, log to ledger

entries.hypothesis: Equal-weight cross-sectional z-score average of 4 informed-trader-flow scorers (v8 Xing 2010 options skew, v9D IV-residual, v11 P/C abnormal volume, insider_form4 Cohen-Malloy 2012 opportunistic) residualized at component level, top-decile equal-weight monthly-rebalance long-only, generates Carhart-4F mean alpha_t >= 2.94 across 5-phase OOS audit on R2000 PIT 2018-2023. Strict-intersection inclusion rule (ticker dropped if any component NaN), no imputation, no subset selection, no parameter tuning. Pre-data-look insurance against scenario where each component lands INCONCLUSIVE/FAIL near program-Bonferroni bar.

params_frozen.design_provenance: Pre-data-look insurance test against scenario where each individual informed-trader-flow signal lands INCONCLUSIVE/FAIL near program-Bonferroni bar. Three options-class signals (v8 Xing 2010, v9D IV-residual, v11 P/C abnormal volume) standalone alpha_t in [+2.18, +2.65] all sub-PASS. Form-4 (insider_form4_opportunistic) component currently in-flight on VPS backfill (~3-5d). Compound formula equal-weight cross-sectional z-score average of all 4 components, top-decile rank, monthly rebalance. Justification per Asness-Frazzini-Pedersen 2019 RAS QMJ multi-factor compound discipline: pre-specify EXACT formula before correlation observation; report correlation matrix post-hoc as diagnostic only. Counter-recommendation from Perplexity adversarial review 2026-05-06 was 'hold single-PASS gating policy'; this pre-reg overrides by locking compound NOW (pre-data-look) to prevent post-Form-4-FAIL HARKing-vulnerable retrofit. Trigger: run only if at least one of 4 components verdict not in {PASS, PASS_ROBUST}; saves Bonferroni budget when singles already win.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity (sonar-reasoning-pro 2026-05-06): math correct for raw alphas (combined alpha_t = (mu_A + mu_B) / sqrt(sigma_A^2 + sigma_B^2 + 2*rho*sigma_A*sigma_B)); rank-based portfolios require empirical computation due to non-linear compression. HARKing risk: conditioning compound design on observed correlation introduces selection bias even when correlation is structural property (Feng-Giglio-Xiu 2020 JF). Failure modes: (1) Form-4 intersect options-flow correlation may be higher than expected because insiders trade ahead of volatility events; (2) correlation instability across regimes (March 2020 collapse precedent); (3) survivorship bias in correlation estimation; (4) rank-aggregation ties inflate effective correlation. Recommended discipline: pre-specify weighting formula a priori (equal-weight z-score), include all 4 signals (no subset selection), Bonferroni penalty for selection (n=29 vs n=27 standard component), report correlation post-hoc as diagnostic. THIS pre-reg follows that discipline in full.

scorer_frozen.specification: Per asof t and ticker x in strict intersection of all 4 component coverages: compute each component score s_k(x,t) via that component's pre-registered scorer module. Cross-sectionally per-asof per-component z-score normalize: z_k(x,t) = (s_k(x,t) - mean_k(t)) / std_k(t) where std uses ddof=1. Compound score = simple average of 4 z-scores. Top-decile rank, equal-weight long-only. Inclusion rule: ticker dropped if any of 4 components NaN at asof t (no imputation, strict intersection).
scorer_frozen.modification_during_audit: PROHIBITED. Any drift in compound formula OR component scorer modules invalidates pre-reg.

params_frozen.data_provider: Component-specific (inherits each component's data sources): SEC EDGAR Form-4 (component 4), iVolatility smd cache 2007-2026 (components 1-2), iVolatility optVol fields (component 3). No new data sources introduced.

bonferroni_accounting.rationale: First test in fresh class compound_v12_informed_trader_2026_05_06. 29th counted test in program-level Bonferroni ledger (28 prior entries + this compound). Naive |t| >= 2.94 = scipy.stats.norm.ppf(1 - 0.025/29). Selection penalty: ZERO. Compound has no data-dependent design choices: formula locked equal-weight, all 4 components included, inclusion rule strict-intersection, trigger structural (PASS/FAIL classification not magnitude). Per Perplexity Feng-Giglio-Xiu 2020 caveat — selection penalty applies when conditioning on observed data; this pre-reg conditions on nothing observed.

auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rule: >= 30% of asof-quarters on TRAIN 2009-2017 must have >= 50 R2000 tickers with all-4-components scored (strict intersection). If < 30%, ABANDON with log 'COVERAGE-FAIL'.
auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rationale: Strict-intersection rule could collapse universe below cross-sectional regression viability. A0 enforces honest breadth check.

auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rule: Empirical pairwise Spearman rho between any 2 of 4 component scores on TRAIN must satisfy: min(rho_pairs) > -0.5 AND max(rho_pairs) < 0.95. Outside this band suggests degenerate composition. ABANDON with log 'CORRELATION-DEGENERATE'.
auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rationale: NOT a low-correlation gate. Excludes only pathological values: extreme anti-correlation (signs flipped) or near-perfect correlation (redundant signal). Accepts anything in [-0.5, 0.95]. Not data-dependent design choice — just sanity check on empirical reality.

auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rule: Spearman rho(compound_score, forward_21d_excess_return) on TRAIN 2009-2017 must be > -0.05. If <= -0.05, ABANDON (sign-flip indicator).
auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.rationale: Avoid wasted multi-phase compute on a compound that has wrong sign on training data.

all_gates_must_pass_R2000_primary.rule: Pooled Carhart 4F alpha_t across 5 phases on R2000-strict-intersection OOS 2018-2023 >= 2.94 (program n=29 critical).
Every phase alpha_t on R2000 >= 1.5 (no phase below positive-alpha floor).
max(excess_net_ann) - min(excess_net_ann) across 5 phases <= 70 percentage points.

entries.hypothesis: Long-only equal-weighted bottom-quintile Merton-PD portfolio drawn from S&P 1500 PIT (excluding top-50 megacap and excluding top-quintile distress always), with portfolio dollar exposure modulated by HY OAS z-score gate (BAMLH0A0HYM2; floor 0.5, ceiling 1.0, linear interp between z=+1 and z=-1), produces mean Carhart-4F alpha t-stat >= 3.50 across 5-phase OOS audit on holdout 2024-04-30..2026-04-30 with every-phase alpha_t >= 0, alpha_t dispersion <= 0.5, Sharpe-improvement >= 0.50 over Carhart-4F-residualized SP1500 baseline, and excess_net_ann dispersion <= 50pp. Pre-committed contingency: if Phase A overlay sanity check (correlation spread_z vs forward 21d market return on TRAIN) fails monotonicity, drop Layer 4 and run pure long-only safe-decile under same |t|>=3.50 threshold.

params_frozen.design_provenance: Designed 2026-05-04 after 17/17 completed pre-reg FAILs across 6 burnt classes (alt_data 6/6, options_implied 5/5, price_factor 4/4, multi_source 3/3, event_drift 2/2 BREADTH-FAIL, risk_overlay 1/1) plus 6 PROSPECTIVE/ABANDONED entries (n=23 in ledger). Cross-sectional attack surface on burnt 2024-04-30..2026-04-30 holdout empirically saturated. This experiment introduces a structurally novel attack surface: compound Layer 2 (Screener) x Layer 4 (Risk overlay) hypothesis per ADR 0007, using two feature spaces never touched in any prior experiment: us-gaap:Liabilities (leverage) via naive KMV Merton distance-to-default + ICE BofA US High Yield OAS macro regime gate.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity Sonar Reasoning Pro (high effort, 2026-05-04) identified 2 FATAL flaws + 5 mitigable concerns. FATAL #1: HY OAS exposure mapping can invert in post-shock recovery regimes (2008-09, 2020) where wider spreads coincide with rising equity. Mitigation: pre-commit Phase A auto-pivot (A4-extended) drops Layer 4 from PRIMARY if overlay sanity check fails on TRAIN. FATAL #2: distress quintile threshold + HY OAS gate boundaries z=+/-1 are hyperparameters; implicit grid search would inflate n. Mitigation: locked to literature values (quintile 20% Fama-French standard; z=+/-1 1-sigma standard per Frazzini-Pedersen 2014 BAB; min exposure floor 0.5 per Moreira-Muir 2017 vol-target convention). Mitigable concerns documented in memo: naive KMV adequacy (Bharath-Shumway 2008 rho~0.95; Phase A descriptive Kendall-tau check), SP1500 PIT survivorship (~100-300bps/y, asymmetric favoring safe names), Carhart-4F vs 6F (4F primary, 6F descriptive sensitivity), FRED revision risk (HY OAS rarely revised >5bps), 2024-2026 regime unfavorability (mid-cap rally + spread compression + mega-cap-tech surge structurally suppress hypothesis; pass-prob revised 15-20%->8-12% ex-ante).
params_frozen.layer_architecture: Compound L2 x L4 per ADR 0007. L2 (Screener): Merton DD cross-sectional rank -> bottom quintile selection. L4 (Risk overlay): HY OAS z-score -> linear exposure interpolation [0.5, 1.0]. Compound hypothesis pays single Bonferroni (atomic experiment). Subsequent variants (e.g., L/S, different exposure floor) burn separate ledger entries.

merton_dd.V_definition: equity_mcap + total_liabilities (naive KMV; sigma_V approx sigma_E documented limitation per Bharath-Shumway 2008)
merton_dd.D_source: us-gaap:Liabilities (PIT filed_date <= asof, latest filed per period_end) from companyfacts parquet ~/.alphalens/companyfacts_parquet/
merton_dd.sigma_definition: annualized 60d realized daily log-return vol (np.log(close/close_prev).std() * sqrt(252))
merton_dd.score_direction: score = -PD; engine top_n picks lowest-PD names = safest

credit_regime_overlay.literature_anchor: Frazzini-Pedersen 2014 BAB regime gate convention (1-sigma threshold). Min exposure floor 0.5 per Moreira-Muir 2017 vol-target convention (relaxed floor; M-M can de-lever further with 1/sigma^2 capped).
credit_regime_overlay.application_layer: OUTSIDE engine in experiment driver; does NOT modify scorer ranks. adjusted_returns(t) = exposure(t) * port_returns(t) + (1 - exposure(t)) * cash_rate(t)

universe_construction.distress_quintile_literature_anchor: Fama-French quintile standard (1993) + Bali-Cakici-Whitelaw 2011 MAX-effect convention + Frazzini-Pedersen 2014 BAB long-leg convention

entries.hypothesis: Foster SUE drift in [d+2, d+60] post-announcement window persists strongest among low-accrual-ratio (high earnings quality) firms. entries.hypothesis: Long-only top-decile equal-weight monthly-rebalance Form-4 opportunistic-insider net-buy magnitude (Cohen-Malloy-Pomorski 2012, faithful paper-spec replication) residualized cross-sectionally vs reversal_1m/momentum_6m/rv_30d generates Carhart-4F mean alpha_t >= 2.86 across 5-phase OOS audit on R2000 PIT 2018-2023, with R3000 reported as secondary diagnostic without separate Bonferroni unit.

params_frozen.design_provenance: Fresh single-class test of Cohen-Malloy-Pomorski 2012 (JFE) opportunistic-insider net-buy magnitude on Russell 2000 PIT. Distinct from archived cluster scorer (Layer 2d, CLOSED 2026-04-24) which used multiple-insiders-within-30d aggregation and FAILed (Carhart αt=2.14 IS -> 0.68 OOS overfit). Mechanism: per-insider 5y rolling history classifies routine (regular calendar-month pattern) vs opportunistic (irregular purposive timing); only opportunistic insiders retained in signal aggregation. Hypothesis is that opportunistic-insider net-buy magnitude over 6m rolling window, residualized cross-sectionally vs equity controls, generates Carhart 4F αt >= 2.86 across 5-phase OOS audit on R2000 PIT 2018-2023. Choice motivated by (a) Perplexity reasoning rejecting compound v9D+v11 ensemble (HARKing) and v11 variant (multiplicity not escaped), recommending fresh class C; (b) Form-4 ranked above analyst-revisions due to lower decay risk + orthogonal mechanism; (c) Cohen-Malloy specifically chosen over Lakonishok-Lee net-buy because routine/opportunistic split pre-filters noise.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity (sonar-reasoning-pro 2026-05-05) rated path C (fresh class) as substantially more defensible than path A (compound ensemble: HARKing-adjacent, expected mechanism rho 0.65 caps ceiling at 2.55-2.65) or path B (variant on burnt 2008-2018 window). Within fresh classes, Form-4 > analyst revisions (lower decay; orthogonal mechanism). Second perplexity invocation locked: R2000 primary universe (Cohen-Malloy effect concentrated in small-caps per Table 2), accept 126d bootstrap block (matches signal window), pre-register 70pp dispersion gate for R2000 with literature citation. Gemini (gemini-3-pro-preview thinkdeep 2026-05-05) raised three load-bearing concerns, all addressed by amendments: Z1 block-bootstrap mismatch fixed via block_size=126d; Z2 stealth-multiplicity acknowledged in postmortem prose only (no n bump per project convention); Z3 size-stratification fixed via R2000 primary + R3000 secondary diagnostic. No FATAL flaws identified. Decision: PROCEED to backfill + pre-reg lock.

scorer_frozen.specification: Per-asof OLS residual of (net_oppor_usd_t / equity_mcap_t) against (reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d) cross-sectionally. net_oppor_usd_t = sum over opportunistic insiders (per Cohen-Malloy classifier) of (buy_usd - sell_usd) on (P, S) coded transactions by officers/directors over rolling 6m window [t-6m, t]. Score = +residual (NET BUY direction = positive score, no sign-flip). Long top-decile equal-weighted by score.
scorer_frozen.classifier_specification: FAITHFUL REPLICATION of Cohen-Malloy-Pomorski 2012 JFE p. 1786 Section III.A. Classification performed at START of each calendar year Y based on 3 preceding years history. Step 1: pull all Form-4 records filed by person_cik in window [Y-3, Y). Step 2 (eligibility): require >=1 trade in EACH of the 3 preceding calendar years; if any year has zero trades, UNCLASSIFIED (excluded from signal). Step 3 (routine check): if eligible AND there exists any calendar month M in 1..12 such that the insider made >=1 trade in month M in each of the 3 preceding years, classify as ROUTINE. Step 4: if eligible but not routine, classify as OPPORTUNISTIC. Classification locked at start of year Y, reused for all year-Y trades. Re-evaluated annually using rolling [Y-3, Y) window. Routine + UNCLASSIFIED records dropped from signal aggregation.

carhart_regression_hac_lock.rationale: 6-month rolling signal window induces ~126-day autocorrelation in portfolio composition, which propagates to residual autocorrelation in the daily return regression. Default Newey-West lag rule int(4*(n/100)^(2/9)) yields ~14 lags for n=1500 daily obs — too short to capture the 126-day signal memory. Lock hac_maxlags=126 explicitly per `run_regression` docstring guidance for overlapping-signal regimes. Without this override, t-stats would be inflated by under-specified HAC kernel.

target_definition.construction: raw excess return over RF (20d-forward close-to-close minus 20d-cumulative RF). Reuses target.forward_excess_return with holding_period=20.
target_definition.post_hoc_attribution: Carhart-4F regression of realised 20d-forward portfolio returns on 20d-aggregated Mkt-RF/SMB/HML/MOM. Daily factor returns are summed (arithmetic) over the 20-day holding window matching each portfolio observation. NOT pre-residualized at target level.

portfolio_construction.ranking: predicted forward excess return per (ticker, asof) from the global Lasso (trained on 20d targets)
portfolio_construction.overlap_design: Stride=5 with holding=20 means consecutive rebalance observations share 75% of the holding window (15 of 20 days). This is equivalent to running 4 weekly tranches each holding for 20d. The portfolio_returns series at stride-5 asof dates therefore exhibits MA(3) autocorrelation by construction; HAC standard errors with maxlags=5 correct for this.
portfolio_construction.universe: AlphaLens PIT universe (yfinance + survivorship parquet), ADV ≥ $5M filter applied at scoring time

cost_model.applied_to: every entry and exit (round-trip = 20 bps base + 5 bps adverse selection one-way → 30 bps total). Per-rebalance turnover scaled cost stays at the same per-rebalance bp level as v1/v2; total annualized cost drag is naturally lower because each tranche only contributes 1/4 of capital and turnover-per-tranche is similar to v2 (annual cost ≈ 25-30% of v2's ~3% drag → ~0.7-1%/y).

statistical_inference.hac_maxlags_rationale: Per zen+perplexity adversarial review: stride=5 with holding=20 produces overlapping returns where consecutive samples share 15/20=75% of the window. Autocorrelation has theoretical structure of MA(3) at lag k≤3 (consecutive overlap) plus residual at lag 4 (touching, no overlap). Setting maxlags=5 explicitly (one above MA-order) is conservative per Newey-West / Andrews lag-selection guidance for overlapping-data inference. Default Newey-West formula `4*(T/100)^(2/9)` is tuned for daily data and would underestimate lag length here.
statistical_inference.sharpe_annualization: Lo (2002) variance-ratio-adjusted Sharpe via existing alphalens.backtest.metrics.sharpe_autocorr_adjusted, which corrects for the autocorrelation introduced by overlap. Periods-per-year = 252/stride = 50.4 (per-rebalance cadence).

params_frozen.design_provenance: Pan-Poteshman 2006 (RFS) INSPIRED proxy test using aggregated daily put-call volume on a pre-2018 fresh OOS window. NOT a literal replication: Pan-Poteshman used proprietary CBOE open-close transaction data with informed/uninformed flow decomposition, demonstrating 'only the nonpublic (informed) signal predicts returns; the public signal shows no predictability' (RFS 2006 abstract + Perplexity adversarial review 2026-05-05). We have only daily-aggregated optVolPut/optVolCall from iVol /smd, which conflates informed and uninformed flow plus mechanical-hedging volume from market makers. The pure-replica scorer would test the PUBLIC component which Pan-Poteshman themselves showed is non-predictive — guaranteed FAIL by their own results. To extract the predictive subset, the scorer residualizes the abnormal P/C ratio against equity controls (log_marketCap, reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d) cross-sectionally, mirroring v9D's residualization architecture. Discovery: cache audit 2026-05-05 (post v9D retrospective INCONCLUSIVE) verified that vendor /smd endpoint pre-aggregates these P/C fields — feature columns that v7/v8/v9A/v9D NEVER used (those used only IV-level features ivx30, ivp30, rv_30d). Cache backfill 2026-05-04 extended pre-2018 history for ~949 tickers with full P/C field coverage. Window 2008-2018 IS adjacent OOS to source literature (Pan-Poteshman 1990-2001) and PRE-DATES most post-2015 structural changes (zero-DTE 2019+, Robinhood retail flow 2015+, MM hedging automation). FAIL on 2008-2018 = clean kill (proxy didn't work even in favorable era). PASS = corroborates extractability of Pan-Poteshman-class signal from aggregated data via residualization. Same retrospective methodology bundle (pre-reg + multi-phase + Andrews-Manski bounds + Romano-Wolf) as v9d_retrospective_pre_2018_2026_05_05.
params_frozen.design_memo: TBD — to be drafted after adversarial review (B1.1)
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: DUAL-ROUND PRE-LOCK adversarial review 2026-05-05: (Round 1, before draft) Perplexity Sonar Reasoning Pro flagged cache-audit-driven discovery as exploratory contamination → program-level Bonferroni n=26 |t|≥2.85 BINDS regardless of class label; decay literature absent-but-plausible post-2015. (Round 2, after draft, zen gemini-3-pro-preview + Perplexity high-context): both converged on APPROVE-WITH-AMENDMENTS. Critical findings: (1) Pan-Poteshman 2006 explicitly demonstrated public-flow component is NON-PREDICTIVE; aggregated daily data captures public confounds (mechanical hedging, vol scaling, contemporaneous returns) — pure replica without residualization is GUARANTEED FAIL by Pan-Poteshman's own evidence, mechanical not signal-test. (2) Scorer must residualize abnormal P/C against (log_marketCap, reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d) controls to have any chance of extracting predictive subset (zen amendment, Perplexity-corroborated). (3) Universe U2 (cache-only) silently drops mid-period delistings, biasing put-volume signal — FAIL on U2 alone insufficient to close class; require U3 NBER follow-up if non-FAIL verdict. (4) 2008-09 GFC may saturate 60d-rolling cross-sectional ranking — Phase 0 saturation diagnostic added. (5) Frame honestly as 'Pan-Poteshman-inspired proxy test using aggregated daily data' NOT 'replication' (literature-honest given data limitations). Verdict: APPROVE pre-reg lock with these 5 amendments incorporated 2026-05-05.

scorer_frozen.specification: Cross-sectional residual of abnormal P/C volume against equity controls. Per-asof: (1) compute pcr_t = log(optVolPut_t / max(optVolCall_t, 1)) per ticker; (2) compute abnormal_pcr_t = pcr_t - rolling_mean(pcr, window=60_trading_days, min_obs=30); (3) per asof, run cross-sectional OLS: abnormal_pcr_t ~ log_marketCap + reversal_1m + momentum_6m + rv_30d; (4) score = -residual (negate so highest-score = abnormally-LOW pcr = bullish call activity per Pan-Poteshman 2006). Architecture identical to v9D cross_sectional_residual.score_cross_sectional_residual, only feature swap (abnormal_pcr_t in place of -ivp30). Residualization is PRE-COMMITTED amendment per zen+Perplexity adversarial review 2026-05-05; without it the scorer would test only the public-flow component which Pan-Poteshman 2006 demonstrated lacks predictive power.
scorer_frozen.feature_construction: Step 1: pcr_t = log(optVolPut_t / max(optVolCall_t, 1.0)). Sentinel: if optVolPut_t == 0 OR optVolCall_t == 0, set pcr_t = NaN (zero-volume tickers excluded). Step 2: abnormal_pcr_t = pcr_t - mean(pcr over t-60..t-1 trading days), requiring ≥30 non-NaN obs in window. Step 3: equity controls per asof: log_marketCap = log(marketCap), reversal_1m = -close_t/close_{t-21}+1, momentum_6m = close_{t-21}/close_{t-126}-1, rv_30d = std(log_returns over t-30..t-1)*sqrt(252). Step 4: cross-sectional OLS of abnormal_pcr_t on [log_marketCap, reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d] per asof, score = -residual. Min 50 tickers per asof for cross-sectional regression to be valid; below 50 → return NaN scores for that asof.
scorer_frozen.score_direction: Long-only top decile by score (= -residual of abnormal_pcr_t). Equal weight. Equivalent to selecting tickers where actual put/call ratio is most-anomalously-LOW relative to size+momentum+vol controls, interpreted per Pan-Poteshman 2006 as abnormal informed call buying.

params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity (sonar-reasoning-pro 2026-05-04) ranked candidate B (this design) #1 of 5 alternatives because (a) acceptance reframe per ADR 0007 doesn't burn alpha-class Bonferroni, (b) Kelly/CPPI/drawdown-control literature post-2020 supports overlay robustness, (c) directionality is asymmetric — PASS shifts deploy-readiness priors sharply, FAIL falsifies L4-on-this-base only. Zen (gemini-3-pro-preview, high thinking) seconded with three hardenings folded in: (1) DISCARD Jobson-Korkie inference (IID-normal broken by skew/kurt/autocorrelation of options-implied portfolios) → use Ledoit-Wolf-style block-bootstrap Sharpe-difference; (2) ADD MaxDD-reduction gate alongside Sharpe-improvement (overlay that smooths vol but doesn't truncate left tail is useless); (3) keep overlay COMPUTATIONALLY DUMB — pure realized-equity-curve drawdown trigger, no macro features, no predictive logic, no leverage. Zen also flagged 'honest +2.2' may be selection effect from 4 prior tests; mitigation = freeze v9D as-spec'd not as best-of-4, plus base-replication consistency gate.

Build augmented matrix X_aug (n × 10): negated options (4 cols) + equity-positive (3 cols) + equity-negative (3 cols). Fit LassoCV(positive=True, eps=1e-6, n_alphas=25, cv=3). Map back to original-feature standardized space: coef_options = -β_aug[options_neg], coef_equity = β_aug[equity_pos] - β_aug[equity_neg]. Net: coef_options ≤ 0 mechanically, coef_equity free-sign.

The v9D L/S diagnostic was already FAIL'd (αt=−0.92), so no L/S construction path. Cross-period diagnostic 2026-05-04 confirmed STABLE verdict (αt range 1.52 across 4 calendar sub-periods, min +1.65 well above CONCENTRATED floor 0.5). entries.hypothesis: Independent fresh-OOS replication of v9D cross-sectional residual scorer (parameter-free per-asof OLS on -ivp30 vs equity controls) on 2008-04-30 → 2018-04-29 window the model has NEVER been evaluated against. Pre-2018 cache extended via ivolatility backfill 2026-05-04 (~949 tickers with pre-2018 history). Replication tests whether v9D recorded αt=+2.29 (5-phase mean on burnt 2024-04-30 → 2026-04-30 holdout) generalizes to a regime closer to Xing 2010 in-sample (1996-2005). Three universe variants (U1 legacy, U2 ivol-cache, U3 NBER-method rebuild) for survivorship-bias sensitivity. Three sub-periods (GFC, mid-cycle, late-cycle) for regime stability. 5 phases × 3 sub × 3 universes = 45 cells. Romano-Wolf (n=25 family) adjusted critical threshold expected |t|≥2.13. Andrews-Manski bounds inference with B ∈ [1.0%, 2.0%]/y bias range. Synthetic terminal return -1.0 (Shumway 1997) for mid-period delistings.

Tests Moreira-Muir 2017 hypothesis on R2000-PIT. Layer 4 risk overlay per ADR 0007.

params_frozen.vol_lookback_rationale: 5 weekly periods ~= 25 trading days ~= 1 month, parity with Moreira-Muir 2017 monthly mechanism (zen review: 26 weeks would be too smooth to react to regime shifts)

success_criteria.pass_rule: Multi-phase audit per playbook Step 5: mean alpha t >= 1.96 AND mean scaled-Sharpe-net > mean unscaled-BASE-Sharpe-net (risk-adjusted improvement gate). Per zen review: absolute every-phase-excess-net gate dropped because vol-targeting is a risk-reduction mechanism — can drag absolute returns during low-vol bull runs while still improving Sharpe.
success_criteria.rationale: Moreira-Muir 2017 (Journal of Finance) vol-managed portfolios. Tests whether time-series sizing rescues a phase-aliased base. Honest expectation is MID/FAIL given base has no phase-robust expectancy; mechanism is academically distinct enough to warrant n=1 fresh-class test. Known limitation per ADR 0007: vol-scaling makes betas time-varying; OLS Carhart-4F alpha is distorted, primary metric is Sharpe-improvement.

outcome.notes: OOS mean αt=+0.49 (same as BASE +0.49 — overlay added no alpha), excess net mean=-7.0% (±40.3pp). FAIL on |t|>=1.96 gate by wide margin. Critical methodological finding: vol-targeting is reactive (uses past realized vol), so it can lever UP just before a regime shift. Phase 3 OOS: BASE excess net was -43.8%; overlay -77.9% (overlay AMPLIFIED losses by levering into the drawdown). Phase 1 OOS: BASE had spurious αt=+2.00; overlay damped to +1.40 by de-leveraging the lucky phase. Net effect: overlay damps both wins and losses asymmetrically given the base's weak expectancy. Time-varying-beta hazard documented in ADR 0007 confirmed empirically. Class risk_management_overlay_2026_04_30 1/1 FAIL.

entries.hypothesis: Long-only top-decile equal-weight monthly-rebalance Form-4 opportunistic-insider net-buy magnitude (Cohen-Malloy-Pomorski 2012, faithful paper-spec replication) residualized cross-sectionally vs reversal_1m/momentum_6m/rv_30d generates Carhart-4F mean alpha_t >= 3.12 (Bonferroni n=28) across 5-phase OOS audit on R2000 PIT 2018-2023, with R3000 reported as secondary diagnostic. Regression input is daily continuous-holding portfolio returns (~1500 daily obs over 6yr OOS), HAC maxlags=126 trading days. Block bootstrap is synchronous across all 5 phases.

params_frozen.design_provenance: Fresh single-class test of Cohen-Malloy-Pomorski 2012 (JFE) opportunistic-insider net-buy magnitude on Russell 2000 PIT. Distinct from archived cluster scorer (Layer 2d, CLOSED 2026-04-24) which used multiple-insiders-within-30d aggregation and FAILed (Carhart αt=2.14 IS -> 0.68 OOS overfit). Mechanism: per-insider 5y rolling history classifies routine (regular calendar-month pattern) vs opportunistic (irregular purposive timing); only opportunistic insiders retained in signal aggregation. Hypothesis is that opportunistic-insider net-buy magnitude over 6m rolling window, residualized cross-sectionally vs equity controls, generates Carhart 4F αt >= 2.86 across 5-phase OOS audit on R2000 PIT 2018-2023. Choice motivated by (a) Perplexity reasoning rejecting compound v9D+v11 ensemble (HARKing) and v11 variant (multiplicity not escaped), recommending fresh class C; (b) Form-4 ranked above analyst-revisions due to lower decay risk + orthogonal mechanism; (c) Cohen-Malloy specifically chosen over Lakonishok-Lee net-buy because routine/opportunistic split pre-filters noise.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity (sonar-reasoning-pro 2026-05-05) rated path C (fresh class) as substantially more defensible than path A (compound ensemble: HARKing-adjacent, expected mechanism rho 0.65 caps ceiling at 2.55-2.65) or path B (variant on burnt 2008-2018 window). Within fresh classes, Form-4 > analyst revisions (lower decay; orthogonal mechanism). Second perplexity invocation locked: R2000 primary universe (Cohen-Malloy effect concentrated in small-caps per Table 2), accept 126d bootstrap block (matches signal window), pre-register 70pp dispersion gate for R2000 with literature citation. Gemini (gemini-3-pro-preview thinkdeep 2026-05-05) raised three load-bearing concerns, all addressed by amendments: Z1 block-bootstrap mismatch fixed via block_size=126d; Z2 stealth-multiplicity acknowledged in postmortem prose only (no n bump per project convention); Z3 size-stratification fixed via R2000 primary + R3000 secondary diagnostic. No FATAL flaws identified. Decision: PROCEED to backfill + pre-reg lock.

scorer_frozen.specification: Per-asof OLS residual of (net_oppor_usd_t / equity_mcap_t) against (reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d) cross-sectionally. net_oppor_usd_t = sum over opportunistic insiders (per Cohen-Malloy classifier) of (buy_usd - sell_usd) on (P, S) coded transactions by officers/directors over rolling 6m window [t-6m, t]. Score = +residual (NET BUY direction = positive score, no sign-flip). Long top-decile equal-weighted by score.
scorer_frozen.classifier_specification: FAITHFUL REPLICATION of Cohen-Malloy-Pomorski 2012 JFE p. 1786 Section III.A. Classification performed at START of each calendar year Y based on 3 preceding years history. Step 1: pull all Form-4 records filed by person_cik in window [Y-3, Y). Step 2 (eligibility): require >=1 trade in EACH of the 3 preceding calendar years; if any year has zero trades, UNCLASSIFIED (excluded from signal). Step 3 (routine check): if eligible AND there exists any calendar month M in 1..12 such that the insider made >=1 trade in month M in each of the 3 preceding years, classify as ROUTINE. Step 4: if eligible but not routine, classify as OPPORTUNISTIC. Classification locked at start of year Y, reused for all year-Y trades. Re-evaluated annually using rolling [Y-3, Y) window. Routine + UNCLASSIFIED records dropped from signal aggregation.

bounds_adjusted_ci.method: Romano-Wolf step-down via stationary block bootstrap (Politis-Romano)
bounds_adjusted_ci.block_size_rationale: Matches 6-month signal rolling window per Gemini Z1 amendment. With daily cadence inputs (~1500 obs), block_size_trading_days=126 is naturally in the native unit of the input series — no rebalance/daily conversion needed.
bounds_adjusted_ci.bootstrap_resampling_rationale: The 5 phases sample the same continuous strategy at different phase offsets. At daily cadence, phases hold near-identical baskets on any given calendar day (systemic shocks hit them simultaneously). Independent-resample-per-phase destroys cross-phase covariance and artificially narrows the pooled-mean CI. v2 mandates one block-index sequence per replicate, applied synchronously to all 5 phases per gemini-3-pro adversarial review 2026-05-08.

carhart_regression_hac_lock.rationale: 6-month rolling signal window induces ~126-day autocorrelation in portfolio composition, which propagates to residual autocorrelation in the daily return regression. n~1500 daily obs over 6yr OOS. Default Newey-West rule yields ~14 lags too short for 126-day signal memory; lock at 126 explicitly. NOTE: v1 aborted because the audit_driver had been feeding rebalance-cadence (n~72) returns to run_regression with maxlags=126, silently producing inflated t-stats (verified empirically ~3x inflation). v2 fixes the audit_driver to compute daily continuous-holding returns matching the pre-reg INTENT.

base_scorer.specification: Per-asof OLS residual of (net_oppor_usd_t / equity_mcap_t) against (reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d) cross-sectionally. net_oppor_usd_t = sum over opportunistic insiders (per Cohen-Malloy 2012 routine vs opportunistic classifier with 3y rolling window) of (buy_usd - sell_usd) on (P, S) coded transactions by officers/directors over rolling 6m window [t-6m, t]. Score = +residual; long top-decile equal-weighted.

success_criteria.rationale: Single-test threshold (NOT Bonferroni-adjusted) per pre-reg discipline that paper-trade is a FORWARD CONFIRMATION of the locked v2 hypothesis, not a new test family. Bonferroni-adjusted threshold (|t|>=3.12 for n=28) is RETROSPECTIVE multiplicity protection against the search; prospective confirmation tests use single-test threshold per Romano-Wolf / Holm convention. Note that PASS at 1.96 here is necessary but NOT sufficient for capital deploy — project policy requires FULL PASS on retrospective audit (G1 cleared at strict Bonferroni) which neither OOS 2018-2023 nor final lock 2024-2026 achieved (~0.4σ short on both).

success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy STAYS OFF-TABLE per project policy regardless of paper-trade verdict. Project policy requires FULL PASS on retrospective audit before any capital deploy; v2 returned PASS_MARGINAL on both windows. Paper-trade PASS would strengthen the case for a future re-audit on a wider data window with a higher Bonferroni threshold cleared, but the policy gate is unchanged.

entries.hypothesis: Equal-weight cross-sectional z-score average of two pre-registered orthogonal-class informed-trader signals — insider_form4_opportunistic (Cohen-Malloy 2012 Form-4) and pc_abnormal_volume (Pan-Poteshman 2006 P/C residualized) — generates Carhart-4F mean alpha_t >= 2.974 across 5-phase OOS audit on R2000 PIT 2018-2023 with joint-PASS confirmation on 2024-2026 final lock. Strict-intersection inclusion rule, no imputation, no subset selection, no parameter tuning. Pre-screen-validated cross-sectional orthogonality (mean rho = -0.000035 on IS 2014-2017 across 48 monthly asofs).

params_frozen.design_provenance: Single-test compound on R2000 PIT, building on insider_form4_opportunistic_2026_05_08_v2 PASS_MARGINAL on both 2018-2023 OOS (alpha_t=+2.71) and 2024-2026 final lock (alpha_t=+2.69), and pc_abnormal_volume_retrospective_pre_2018_2026_05_05 INCONCLUSIVE/MID (alpha_t=+2.65). 2-way compound chosen over 4-way compound_v12 (blocked on v8 Xing) for clean orthogonal-class pair (EDGAR fundamental + iVolatility technical). Pre-screen #1 verified mean cross-sectional Spearman rho = -0.000035 across 48 monthly IS asofs; pre-screen #3 verified strict-intersection coverage 100% asofs >= 50 tickers (mean 154); pre-screen #2 verified P/C is also EXTREME counter-cyclical (matching insider_form4 pattern, see design memo section 7 risk #1).
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Zen (gemini-3-pro 2026-05-10): AMEND with +6 Bonferroni penalty for implicit C(4,2) selection from 4 candidate compounds (n=29 -> 34, threshold |t|>=2.974). Approved 2-way structure (avoids options-class redundancy), equal-weight (alpha_t diff 2.71 vs 2.65 = noise), joint-PASS rule (rigorous). Z4 flagged moderately serious cyclicality risk on portfolio returns; pre-screen #2 confirmed P/C is also counter-cyclical (verbatim verdict in design memo section 3.5). Perplexity (sonar-reasoning-pro 2026-05-10): AMEND with 3 mandatory pre-reg gates: (A3) factor contribution decomposition >50% per component; (A4) portfolio return correlation diagnostic |corr|<0.40; min combined OOS alpha_t floor 2.5. P-INDEPENDENCE: cross-sectional rho approximately 0 does NOT guarantee portfolio return independence (Blitz-Hanauer 2013); risk verified empirically by pre-screen #2 P/C extreme counter-cyclicality. All amendments folded into Phase A triggers section 5.3.

bonferroni_accounting.rationale_zen_z5_verbatim: Yes, a selection penalty is strictly required; evaluating combinations of 4 distinct candidates to select this specific 2-way pair implicitly consumed C(4,2) = 6 degrees of freedom, meaning your Bonferroni n must increment by 6 (to 34), not 1.

auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.A0_coverage: ABANDON if <30% of asof-quarters have >=50 R2000 strict-intersection tickers
auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.A1_correlation_regime: ABANDON if mean cross-sectional Spearman rho on Phase A IS data not in [-0.5, 0.5]
auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.A2_direction: ABANDON if Spearman rho(compound_score, forward_21d_excess) on TRAIN < -0.05 (sign-flip)
auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.A3_factor_contribution: perplexity P-LIT: monthly per-component contribution; if one component contributes <50% in BOTH windows, ABANDON compound and file solo
auto_pivot_phase_a_triggers.A4_portfolio_correlation_diagnostic: perplexity P-INDEPENDENCE: rolling 12-month portfolio return correlation between insider_form4 standalone and pc_abnormal standalone on audit window; INFORMATIONAL only (not kill); document publicly if |corr|>=0.40

verdict_classification.PASS: every-phase alpha_t >= 1.5 AND mean alpha_t >= 2.974 AND mean excess_net_ann >= 0 AND dispersion <= 70pp on BOTH windows
verdict_classification.PASS_MARGINAL: mean alpha_t in [2.50, 2.974) AND every phase alpha_t >= 0 AND dispersion <= 70pp on BOTH windows
verdict_classification.INCONCLUSIVE: mean alpha_t in [2.50, 2.974) AND >=1 phase alpha_t < 0; OR (dispersion > 70pp AND mean >= 2.50); OR PASS_MARGINAL on only ONE window
verdict_classification.FAIL: mean alpha_t < 2.50 OR mean excess_net_ann < 0 OR (dispersion > 70pp AND mean < 2.50) on either window
